professionals.name: Dr. Kis Andrea
professionals.bio: General practitioner in Pécs. Education: Pécsi Orvostudományi Egyetem, Általános Orvostudományi Kar (1989-1995); general medical diploma (1995); licence exam (2001); family medicine specialty exam (2004). Research at POTE Kórélettani Intézet (1996) and POTE Gyermekklinika Genetikai Laboratórium (1997). Professional work: POTE residency training (1999-2001); general practice in Pécs (2001-); mentoring/teaching at PTE ÁOK Alapellátási Intézet (2010-); external member of MEDMAX GP software development team (2008-); roles in TÁMOP and EFOP primary care development projects.
